---
title: "Moral Dilemmas & Consequence Chains"
aliases: []
family: "Story, Character & Voice"
media: []
facets:
  effects: []
  problems: []
  components: []
  genre: []
provenance: ""
---

<!-- STUB — Phase 2 outline. Prose gated until Phase 4. Tracked in #46. -->

<!-- BACKLINKS:START (generated by scripts/backlinks.py — do not edit by hand) -->

## Referenced by

- [Beat Taxonomies & Craft Models](../structure-pacing/beat-taxonomies-and-craft-models.qmd)

<!-- BACKLINKS:END -->
